economic_notes: Nation holds 99.99% interest in Xat'sull Limited Partnership (revenues $924,595, expenses $684,315). Holds 50% interest in Likely Xat'sull Community Forest Ltd. Also holds investments in Xat'sull Logging Ltd and Xat'sull Development Ltd. Operates Carpenter Mountain Ranch. Has heritage village, campsite, and community forest operations.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Accumulated surplus on statement of operations shows $26,556,457 but notes show $27,424,068 — the difference relates to replacement reserve and contributed surplus treatment. Total government transfers estimated to include ISC $4,613,407 + Northern Shuswap Treaty Society $434,014 + Three Corners Health Society $330,232 + First Nations Health Authority $180,793 + CCATEC $156,878 + CMHC $80,583 + Northern Shuswap Tribal Council $205,782 + Canada Summer Jobs $13,654 + Province of BC $1,760,597 + Northern Development Initiative Trust $23,000 + FNESC $59,463 + New Relationship Trust $7000 + Knucwentwecw Society $235000 = ~$8,100,403 estimated. Nation uses equity method for Xat'sull Limited Partnership and Likely Xat'sull Community Forest. No schedule of remuneration provided. Large revenue variance from budget ($10.4M actual vs $6.0M budget) driven by ISC and Province of BC. Gibraltar Mines contributed $492,577 vs budget of $97,500.
